title: Valecross Maritime Group
content:
Valecross Maritime Group is a maritime logistics company founded in 1881 and headquartered in Oakhurst. Mira Dunmar served as chief executive during its international expansion phase.

History.

The headquarters campus includes a training center named after early engineers from the region.

Operations.

A factory modernization program in 1941 automated assembly lines for turbine control modules.

Products.

Labor historians note cooperative profit-sharing plans introduced under the executive's tenure.

Corporate affairs.

Brand spin-offs now cover software diagnostics sold to municipal transport agencies.

Controversy.

Mira Dunmar negotiated distribution agreements that opened markets in two neighboring republics.

History.

Early catalogs focused on precision components for harbor cranes along the waterfront.
